title: turbo build cache silently serves stale dist/ for packages without a src/ directory

title: [PR] fix(pg-codegen): flat ParameterRef for all CRUD param names (multi-word PK save fails on Postgres)
summary:
## The bug
PostgreSQL CRUD save/update/delete **fails on any entity whose primary key has a multi-word name** (camelCase/PascalCase), e.g. a connector table keyed on a soft-PK `recordKey`:

```
PostgreSQLDataProvider.ExecuteSQL failed [Save Customers]: column "p_record_key" does not exist
```

## Ro

It intentionally does **not** claim full product parity. The machine-reada

Skip-only examples accumulated compile-time rot silently. Nothing built them, so TypeScript errors and broken imports were invisible until someone ran the code. This PR adds a compile-level safety net with three parts.

title: [PR] fix: fall back to global disabledMcpServers when project has none configured
summary:
## Problem

When a project directory has no `disabledMcpServers` entry in its per-project config inside `.openclaude.json`, `isMcpServerDisabled()` returns `false` for every server. This causes **all configured MCP servers to be enabled** in that project — including servers the user explicitly disab

summary:
Adds the benchmark harness from docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-accuracy-benchmark-harness-design.md:

- benchmarks/quodeq_bench: black-box runner, evidence parser (refs + req_refs CWE carriers), label matcher (file + ±5-line window + class), per-dimension precision/recall metrics, report + markdo
